entries.text: Convert all pending items in A..AB into normalized records with fields: `id`, `owner`, `priority`, `milestone`, `dependencies`, `verification`.
Add dependency graph so blocked items are explicit and sequence is deterministic.
Add priority rubric (`P0 blocker`, `P1 critical`, `P2 important`, `P3 opportunistic`).
Add WIP limits per wave to avoid dilution and partial hardening.
For each item, require pre-implementation failing test or failing gate reproduction.
Require post-implementation proof: passing tests, passing gate, passing relevant CI lane.
Require artifact evidence path update in TODO record before status can move to done.
Add auto-reopen logic when regression appears in any subsequent run.
Add `pending_item_count` metric exported per day.
Add `hardening_throughput` metric (# items closed / week).
Add `regression_reopen_rate` metric.
Add `ci_security_green_streak` metric (consecutive green runs for security lanes).
Add target thresholds and breach alerts for each metric.
Wave-A: close all CI/workflow reliability items (Semgrep/SARIF/permissions/preflight/assertions).
Wave-B: close super-gate sequencing/governance and extended-lane enforcement items.
Wave-C: close report schema migration and normalization strict-mode readiness items.
Wave-D: close provenance/attestation/revocation promotion blockers.
Wave-E: close runtime API schema/quotas/abuse defense and regression corpus items.
Wave-F: close resilience drills, compliance exports, and long-term governance sustainment items.
Add validator script that checks: pending count == 0, no critical exceptions active, and last N security runs green.
Add validator script that checks: all completed items have verification evidence links.
Add validator script that checks: no unresolved trigger-backed findings in last review period.
Only if all validators pass, permit writing terminal completion marker.
Add new TODO items only when backed by one of: incident, CI failure, audit finding, threat-model delta, architecture change.
Every new item must include trigger reference and verification plan.
Do not append speculative duplicate categories already covered by A..AC.
Continue with implementation of existing pending items until pending count is zero.
Add gate to verify each gate writes exactly one primary report artifact path.
Add gate to verify report filenames are stable across runs (no accidental renames).
Add gate to verify report `status` and process exit-code consistency.
Add gate to verify gate stdout references the same path that was written.
Add validator ensuring every artifact path in workflow upload blocks is produced by at least one step.
Add validator ensuring no produced critical artifact is missing from upload lists.
Add validator ensuring run-scoped evidence root variable is used consistently in all security jobs.
Add validator ensuring artifact names include lane identifiers to avoid collisions.
Add deterministic replay harness for a saved run directory and compare recomputed statuses.
Add gate to detect non-deterministic field drift in otherwise static reports.
Add controlled-seed policy for all stochastic simulations in security tooling.
Add replay artifact index for quick forensic reconstruction.
Add “recent incident firebreak” gate that blocks merges touching affected paths without extra checks.
Add hotfix verification template requiring before/after failing test proof.
Add patch-window policy gate to ensure emergency fixes are later backfilled with full tests/docs.
Add recurring-failure suppressor policy to prevent silent normalization of chronic failures.
Add gate to verify every strict lane has at least one explicit fail-closed control.
Add gate to verify every non-blocking warning lane emits explicit degraded-mode artifact.
Add gate to ensure exception paths include owner + expiry + justification fields.
Add gate to fail when expired degraded-mode allowances are still active.
Add check that security reports never echo secret env var names/values in `findings`.
Add check that fallback key indicators are not present in strict release lanes.
Add key-usage ledger artifact per run (which key mode/path used by each signature gate).
Add policy check for key-mode mismatch between sibling gates in same lane.
Add gate to scan docs for commands that would weaken security controls and flag outdated guidance.
Add gate to ensure sample snippets use pinned versions/SHAs where applicable.
Add gate to ensure newly added security scripts are referenced by at least one workflow or explicitly archived.
Add gate to ensure archived scripts are excluded from active security quality checks intentionally.
Add gate asserting each control has explicit intended failure mode and expected remediation.
Add gate asserting every control has a measurable success criterion.
Add gate asserting each control has an owner escalation path.
Add gate asserting control IDs are unique and immutable across revisions.
Add guard to detect step reordering that violates security dependency ordering.
Add guard to detect removed required env vars in security jobs.
Add guard to detect unreviewed changes to artifact upload path lists.
Add guard to detect accidental matrix shrinkage for security lanes.
Add check that each FAIL finding includes a machine-readable reason code.
Add check that each WARN finding includes downgrade rationale and expiry.
Add check that summary counts reconcile exactly with findings arrays.
Add check that metadata includes gate version and execution context.
Add gate that verifies all promotion blockers are explicitly enumerated per run.
Add gate that verifies no blocker class is silently converted to WARN in release lanes.
Add gate that verifies promotion decision artifact references immutable run IDs and digests.
Add gate that verifies rollback candidate artifacts were previously attested under equivalent policy.
Add test corpus for distributed low-rate abuse evasion patterns.
Add test corpus for mixed valid/invalid token spray sequences.
Add gate checking anomaly thresholds are not loosened without signed approval.
Add gate checking replay/idempotency telemetry includes collision provenance.
Add gate verifying installed security tools match expected interpreter ABI and platform tags.
Add gate verifying wheel provenance metadata for pinned security tools.
Add gate verifying no implicit dependency upgrades occurred during install.
Add gate verifying tool invocation flags remain policy-compliant.
Add gate comparing runbook command examples to current script CLI options.
Add gate ensuring docs reference existing workflow files and steps.
Add gate ensuring architecture docs map to real artifact paths.
Add gate ensuring deprecated docs are marked and excluded from operational guidance.
Add gate verifying each security gate declares deterministic inputs/outputs in metadata.
Add gate verifying runtime duration is captured and bounded per control policy.
Add gate verifying repeated execution does not mutate unrelated artifacts.
Add gate verifying strict lanes do not suppress non-zero returns from critical checks.
Add check for duplicate artifact filenames across workflows that could overwrite in shared contexts.
Add check that artifact names include run and lane discriminators.
Add check that security artifacts avoid ambiguous extensions and hidden files.
Add check that signature files match exact artifact basename conventions.
Add cross-report consistency check: policy gate PASS implies required policy files were verified.
Add cross-report consistency check: provenance gate PASS implies signed artifacts exist and hashes match.
Add cross-report consistency check: super-gate status reflects component gate statuses exactly.
Add consistency check for stale timestamps across related reports.
Add gate ensuring release workflow refuses publish if any required security artifact missing.
Add gate ensuring release workflow uses strict-key mode in all signature-sensitive steps.
Add gate ensuring release evidence roots are isolated from CI/maintenance roots.
Add gate ensuring release rollback verification executes before publish finalization.
Add gate ensuring waiver/exception IDs are globally unique.
Add gate ensuring no exception references deleted controls.
Add gate ensuring exception renewals require new approval signature and reason delta.
Add gate ensuring maximum concurrent waivers per control family is enforced.
Add gate ensuring every FAIL emits at least one alert-ready event payload.
Add gate ensuring alert payloads include owner and runbook link.
Add gate ensuring WARNs with approaching expiry escalate before expiration.
Add gate ensuring telemetry snapshots include toolchain versions used for scan outputs.
Add macOS-specific security lane smoke tests for key gates.
Add Linux/macOS artifact hash comparison for canonical JSON outputs.
Add path-separator normalization tests in all path-sensitive gates.
Add filesystem permission behavior parity report for sensitive outputs.
Add gate detecting workflow step insertion/removal in security jobs without signed approval record.
Add gate detecting condition tampering (`if:` changes) on critical security steps.
Add gate detecting shell-option weakening in security commands (`set +e`, unchecked pipes, ignored returns).
Add gate ensuring security steps run with explicit `cwd` and trusted repo context.
Add gate verifying required SARIF outputs exist before upload steps.
Add gate verifying fallback upload occurs when code-scanning upload is skipped.
Add gate verifying artifact upload paths do not include unintended wildcards.
Add gate verifying artifact retention durations match security policy per workflow class.
Add gate verifying policy signature artifacts and provenance signature artifacts share expected key lineage policy.
Add gate verifying attestation index includes all signed artifacts expected for a lane.
Add gate verifying revocation checks are performed before any promotion decision.
Add gate verifying signature verification reports include strict/non-strict mode explicitly.
Add drill for simultaneous multi-gate failure triage path.
Add drill for partial evidence corruption during incident response.
Add drill for secret rotation mid-run and expected gate behavior.
Add drill for branch protection API unavailability with controlled fail behavior.
Add per-step execution fingerprint (command hash + env profile hash) to security artifacts.
Add gate ensuring each critical step emits start/end markers for traceability.
Add gate ensuring security workflow logs include run correlation IDs.
Add gate ensuring no step emits ambiguous PASS when sub-command failed.
Add gate enforcing policy manifest ordering determinism to prevent noisy diffs.
Add gate verifying every signed policy has matching `.sig` and valid key metadata.
Add gate verifying removed policies are explicitly tombstoned in signed changelog.
Add gate verifying policy schema changes include migration note artifact.
Add gate ensuring abuse telemetry captures token role/source dimensions where available.
Add gate ensuring anomalous replay patterns emit reproducible classifier output.
Add anti-evasion tests for low-and-slow distributed abuse traffic.
Add gate ensuring quota policy edits require signed approval and staged rollout evidence.
Add gate validating shared `run_id` consistency across all security reports in a lane.
Add gate validating timestamp monotonicity within a run’s security report set.
Add gate validating report producer versions are captured and compatible.
Add gate validating no report references artifacts outside allowed evidence roots.
Add gate ensuring security workflows remain enabled on protected branches.
Add gate detecting unpinned reusable workflow references.
Add gate ensuring matrix python versions match supported security tool policy.
Add gate ensuring report write operations include atomic temp-file swap semantics where applicable.
Add gate ensuring evidence directories are created with expected permission masks.
Add periodic integrity sweep for report JSON parseability in historical run directories.
Add gate ensuring signature files are newline-terminated and canonicalized.
Add SLA gate for maximum acceptable time-to-detect security workflow regressions.
Add SLA gate for maximum acceptable time-to-fix critical security CI blockers.
Add accountability report mapping overdue hardening items to owners.
Add gate enforcing closure notes for reopened hardening items.
Add gate ensuring each release has a compact audit bundle pointer artifact.
Add gate ensuring audit bundle contains checksums for every included file.
Add gate ensuring audit bundle verification script is versioned and signed.
Add gate ensuring audit bundle omits non-essential sensitive raw logs by policy.
Add gate to detect shell pipelines in security workflows that are missing `set -euo pipefail`.
Add gate to detect command substitution usage with untrusted input in security scripts.
Add gate to require explicit timeout wrappers for long-running external tool invocations.
Add gate to verify command allowlists are documented and signed.
Add per-report signer identity field and verify against approved signer policy.
Add gate to verify artifact digest algorithm identifiers are explicit and approved.
Add gate to ensure signature verification results are themselves signed in strict lanes.
Add gate to ensure attestation reports include deterministic content hashes for dependencies.
Add gate preventing auto-rerun loops on failing critical security jobs.
Add gate enforcing manual acknowledgement before rerunning failed strict release security checks.
Add gate to verify resumed workflows re-validate prior artifacts instead of trusting cached state.
Add runbook test for safe restart after partial security job failure.
Add gate that computes impacted controls when a policy file changes.
Add gate requiring expanded test selection when high-blast-radius policies are modified.
Add gate requiring dual approval for policy changes impacting strict release controls.
Add signed impact assessment artifact for policy PRs affecting security workflows.
Add gate to reject stale report copies outside run-scoped evidence roots.
Add gate to ensure only latest report per gate is consumed by aggregation steps.
Add gate to ensure report archival does not alter canonical content bytes.
Add gate to prevent accidental report truncation or mixed JSON concatenation.
Add gate validating aggregate dashboards reflect raw report statuses exactly.
Add gate validating trend calculations exclude skipped/irrelevant lanes appropriately.
Add gate validating SLO calculations use documented denominator rules.
Add signed aggregate manifest linking source report digests.
Add gate to detect identical credential tokens reused across incompatible scopes.
Add gate to detect suspicious token naming/pattern drift from policy.
Add gate to detect privileged scope use in non-privileged workflows.
Add gate to require justification artifact for temporary privileged scope escalation.
Add test ensuring every critical gate has at least one explicit FAIL fixture.
Add test ensuring each critical gate fails closed when required inputs are absent.
Add test ensuring each critical gate produces deterministic report ordering.
Add test ensuring each critical gate emits machine-readable reason codes.
Add gate enforcing that release tags include a pointer to security evidence bundle digest.
Add gate enforcing that published artifacts map one-to-one with signed provenance entries.
Add gate enforcing that rollback artifacts retain original security metadata linkage.
Add gate enforcing that release notes include strict security gate outcomes.
Add gate to detect breaking CLI changes in security scripts without version bump note.
Add gate to validate help/usage text stays aligned with workflow invocations.
Add gate to detect removed flags still referenced in docs or workflows.
Add compatibility matrix artifact for script CLI versions.
Add field-level provenance tagging for critical report values.
Add gate ensuring derived fields declare source fields and transformation rules.
Add gate to detect unverifiable derived metrics in aggregated reports.
Add signed provenance manifest for aggregation outputs.
Add coverage gate requiring higher threshold for `tooling/security/security_super_gate.py` and signature gates.
Add gate to fail when critical path tests are skipped or deselected.
Add test map artifact listing critical paths and required tests.
Add gate ensuring only required jobs can read/write specific evidence subtrees.
Add policy for read-only verification jobs with enforced filesystem restrictions.
Add gate to detect unexpected evidence mutations by non-authoritative jobs.
Add audit artifact of job-level evidence access footprints.
Add reason-code catalog file with stable identifiers and severity mappings.
Add gate ensuring every finding reason code exists in catalog.
Add gate ensuring each reason code maps to a runbook remediation.
Add localized summary generation artifact for rapid triage (machine + human readable).
Add confidence score metadata for heuristic/anomaly-based findings.
Add gate to prevent low-confidence findings from silently becoming blockers without policy.
Add gate to require manual confirmation path for uncertain high-impact findings.
Add trend report for confidence-score drift over time.
Add gate to detect unreferenced new security files that are never consumed by workflows.
Add gate to detect orphaned policies not enforced by any gate.
Add gate to detect workflows that claim to run controls but do not emit expected artifacts.
Add periodic signed drift summary report across gates/policies/workflows.
Add batch verifier for prior run bundles to detect retroactive tampering.
Add random historical sample checks with signed result output.
Add gate ensuring historical verification failures escalate as current blockers.
Add retention-tier policy checks for historical artifact availability.
Add gate preventing item closure in TODO without evidence link and validator pass.
Add gate verifying closed items are not reopened silently without reason.
Add monthly closure quality audit with reopened-item root-cause analysis.
Add signed closure ledger artifact for hardening program governance.
